name: ShopMate Sports Demo Store

topics.name: Pickup
topics.summary: Free pickup is available for demo orders over $75 at pickup-enabled demo locations.
details: Pickup availability depends on the location quantities in inventory.json.
The demo data does not reserve items or create a real order.

topics.name: Delivery
topics.summary: Standard demo delivery is 3 to 5 business days from the regional demo warehouse.
details: The demo data does not include zip-specific delivery estimates.
Expedited shipping and carrier selection are not included.

topics.name: Store hours
topics.summary: Demo locations are listed as open from 9 AM to 6 PM local lab time.
details: Hours are example lab data and are not connected to a real store system.

limitations: No real store reservation is created.
No payment, order status, or carrier tracking is available.
No zip-specific delivery date is available.
